commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7e2bb3571f48136ea80fc8b6dc86932a9b9476c0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the official external Weixin channel catalog npm spec and integrity from @tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.3 to 2.4.6.

PR surface: Other 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source and npm metadata reproduce the review finding: the PR targets 2.4.6, whose package metadata requires OpenClaw >=2026.5.12, while the catalog entry still says >=2026.3.22.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code fix is narrow, but missing contributor real behavior proof makes this a human-only merge blocker rather than a repair-lane candidate.

target.title: chore(catalog): bump Weixin plugin to 2.4.6
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96791. The official external channel catalog still pinned `@tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin` to `2.4.3`, so installs and upgrade reconciliation would keep users on the older Weixin plugin even though the package has published `2.4.6`.

## Why This Change Was Made

The catalog entry is the source used by OpenClaw's official external channel install flow. Updating both `npmSpec` and `expectedIntegrity` keeps the install metadata internally consistent and lets the bundled catalog install the current Weixin plugin without integrity mismatches.

## User Impact

Users installing or reconciling the official Weixin channel plugin get `@tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.6` instead of being forced back to `2.4.3` by the bundled catalog.

## Evidence

- Verified npm metadata with `npm view @tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.6 version dist.integrity dist.tarball --json`.
- Confirmed npm latest with `npm view @tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin version --json` returning `2.4.6`.
- Updated `scripts/lib/official-external-channel-catalog.json` to pin `@tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.6` and its matching `sha512-qw9k3PLTiMWGNjjsknHgcTManH1w4j+Ji1ArWIaYLKCq3aFRsVwcqnPi127bvOoVMJGW4dbyJ8NECEMgoO+iRw==` integrity.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts test/official-channel-catalog.test.ts test/release-check.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
target.author: lin-hongkuan
